name: Peanut Butter Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 2 packages cream cheese (8 oz each), at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix the graham cracker crumbs, sugar, and melted margarine in a bowl. Press the mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. Bake the crust for 10 minutes. Remove from the oven but keep it on to maintain temperature.
4. In another bowl, beat the cream cheese with the remaining cup of sugar until smooth.
5. Add the peanut butter and flour to the cream cheese mixture. Beat until well combined.
6. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Stir in the milk.
7. Pour the filling into the prepared crust.
8. Bake in the preheated oven for 55 minutes. Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
9. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan, then allow it to cool completely before removing the rim.
10. Stir the grape jelly until smooth and drizzle over the cheesecake in a lattice design.
11. Refrigerate.
